arts.ttl: We simulated Man City vs Chelsea to predict huge Premier League top-four clash
arts.sum: We predict that the Blues could line up in a 4-2-3-1 formation, with their starting XI as follows: Sanchez; James, Tosin, Chalobah, Cucurella; Caicedo, Enzo; Madueke, Palmer, Sancho; Jackson. After putting an end to their five-game winless Premier League run on Monday, Chelsea will be looking to pick up another vital three points in a tough trip to Manchester City.
